text: Add a Postgres migration for the campaigns table and wire the SEO metadata fields into the CampaignSerializer.
Debug why the marketing-attribution worker drops events under load; the Kafka consumer lag keeps climbing.
Write unit tests for the invoice-reconciliation service that posts journal entries to the ledger API.
Refactor the patient-intake FHIR parser to stream records instead of loading the whole bundle into memory.
Set up CI to run the contract-clause classifier's eval suite on every PR and fail under 0.9 F1.
The recruiting pipeline's candidate-dedupe query is O(n^2); rewrite it with a hashed join and add an index.
Implement retry-with-backoff in the payments webhook handler and make the PCI redaction happen before logging.
Trace the null-pointer in the sales-forecast dashboard's React chart component when a quota is unset.
Add a rate limiter to the ad-bidding service's gRPC endpoints and expose a Prometheus metric for rejected bids.
Fix the timezone bug in the payroll accrual calculator — hours near DST boundaries are off by one.
Write an integration test that mocks the Stripe webhook and asserts the subscription state machine transitions correctly.
The legal-document embedding index OOMs on contracts over 200 pages; stream the chunks and cap batch memory.
Add cursor pagination to the clinical-trials results endpoint and cache the count query in Redis.
Refactor the email-campaign scheduler from a cron into a durable queue with idempotent, at-least-once sends.
Debug the CSV importer that mangles UTF-8 in exported customer-support ticket archives.
Add a feature flag and kill switch around the sales lead-scoring model rollout.
Write three subject-line variants for our Q3 product-launch email campaign targeting mid-market SaaS buyers.
Draft the FY26 operating budget narrative explaining the variance in marketing spend vs plan.
Review this SaaS master services agreement and flag any auto-renewal or liability-cap clauses we should push back on.
Summarize the candidate's interview feedback and recommend hire / no-hire with reasons.
Draft a cold outreach email sequence for enterprise prospects in the logistics vertical.
Reconcile the March credit-card statement against the expense ledger and flag any mismatches.
